description_long: This is a modern, single-seat armchair upholstered in a deep burgundy or maroon fabric, featuring a boxy, geometric silhouette. The chair has a thick, cushioned seat and a tall, rectangular backrest for ample support. Both armrests are wide and padded, running parallel to the seat and finished with subtle piping or seam detailing along the edges. The chair stands on four short, sturdy legs, likely made of dark wood or metal, which are only partially visible beneath the base. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or tufting, giving it a sleek and contemporary look. This type of chair would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or stylish outdoor patios under cover.
description: A modern, boxy armchair with burgundy upholstery, wide padded armrests, and a tall backrest, supported by four short legs. The surface is smooth and plain, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, tall backrest, and both padded armrests with visible seam detailing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the height of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the back panel, with both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other armrest and the chair's overall depth.
